name: Imperva Cloud WAF
description: Imperva Cloud WAF (Incapsula) API for managing site security, ACL rules, IP blacklists, and security events

auth_config.note: Requires both x-API-Id and x-API-Key headers for authentication

actions.name: List Sites
actions.description: Retrieve all sites protected by Imperva Cloud WAF

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Account ID to list sites for

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of sites per page

parameters.name: page_num
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

actions.name: Get Site Status
actions.description: Retrieve the current security status and configuration of a site

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: ID of the site to query

actions.name: Configure ACL Rules
actions.description: Update the ACL configuration (IP blacklist/whitelist) for a site

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: ID of the site to configure

parameters.name: rule_id
parameters.description: ACL rule type: api.acl.blacklisted_ips, api.acl.blacklisted_countries, api.acl.blacklisted_urls, api.acl.whitelisted_ips

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of IP addresses to add to the ACL

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of country codes

parameters.name: urls
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of URLs to blacklist

actions.name: Configure WAF Settings
actions.description: Update WAF security settings and threat actions for a site

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: ID of the site to configure

parameters.name: rule_id
parameters.description: Security rule type (e.g., api.threats.sql_injection, api.threats.cross_site_scripting, api.threats.bot_access_control)

parameters.name: security_rule_action
parameters.description: Action to take: alert, block, block_ip, block_user, captcha

actions.name: Get Security Events
actions.description: Retrieve WAF security events (attacks, blocks) for a site

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: ID of the site to query events for

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Time range: today, last_7_days, last_30_days, last_90_days, month_to_date

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of events per page

parameters.name: page_num
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

actions.name: Get Visit Statistics
actions.description: Retrieve traffic and visit statistics including threats blocked

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: ID of the site to query stats for

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Time range: today, last_7_days, last_30_days, last_90_days

parameters.name: stats
parameters.description: Comma-separated stat types to retrieve

actions.name: Create Incap Rule
actions.description: Create a custom security rule (IncapRule) for advanced traffic filtering

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: ID of the site to add the rule to

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the custom rule

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Rule action: RULE_ACTION_BLOCK, RULE_ACTION_ALERT, RULE_ACTION_REDIRECT, RULE_ACTION_CAPTCHA

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression for matching traffic

actions.name: List Incap Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all custom IncapRules for a site

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: ID of the site to list rules for
